title: [Comb] Add AssumeTwoValued pass
body: I've seen a few places (e.g. in the discussion on #9138) where circt-verilog produces `ceq` comparisons due to the potential for four-valued logic, which isn't supported in several backends (e.g. SMTLIB, BTOR2 export). Having discussed with @fabianschuiki we obviously don't want to indiscriminately throw away this behaviour, but having a way to remove it means that there's still a flow for users to use these back-end tools if they're happy to assume two-valued logic. Currently the only pattern is converting `comb.icmp`s with a `ceq` predicate to ones with an `eq` predicate, but there are a couple of other icmp predicate patterns I'll add in later PRs.
